# Beam

> One link for every fan touchpoint. The link-in-bio platform built for creators worldwide. Unite Instagram, YouTube, podcasts, digital products, and email list capture on one page — in 30 seconds.

Beam is a global Linktree alternative for creators, with an opinionated focus on conversion and creator income:
- 12 block types (link, banner, heading, video, product, email form, countdown, FAQ, carousel, map, HTML embed, add-to-calendar)
- Stripe-powered checkout — sell courses, e-books, and templates directly from your page
- Email capture forms to grow and own your audience
- Theme and brand-color customization
- Real-time click / CTR / referrer analytics
- Multi-page management (Pro and above)
- One-click import from Linktree and Portaly

## Pricing

- Free: free forever, 1 page, 12 blocks, 10% platform fee on sales
- Pro: NT$159 / month (NT$139 annual), 10 pages, 20 blocks each, 5% platform fee, branding removal
- Premium: NT$249 / month (NT$219 annual), unlimited pages & blocks, 2% platform fee, custom domain + CSS

## Key pages

- [Home (English)](/en): English landing
- [Home (中文)](/): Chinese landing

## FAQ

### What is Beam?
Beam is a link-in-bio platform that lets creators put their entire online presence — socials, video, podcast, digital products, and email signup — behind a single short URL.

### Is Beam free?
Yes. Beam has a free-forever plan: 1 page, 12 blocks, and product sales with a 10% platform fee. No credit card required.

### Can I sell digital products on Beam?
Yes, on every plan. Stripe powers checkout. Free pages charge a 10% platform fee, Pro is 5%, Premium is 2%.

### How is Beam different from Linktree?
Beam ships features Linktree doesn't have at comparable plan tiers — product sales on the free plan, email capture on the free plan, the Add-to-Calendar block, native Linktree/Portaly import, and multi-page support. Built mobile-first with sub-1s page loads globally.

### Can I import my existing Linktree?
Yes. Paste your linktr.ee or portaly.cc URL and Beam pulls over your links, social icons, profile name, bio, and avatar in about 30 seconds.
